channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Catering Staff
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location: Italian flag
Description:

Personnel are sought for Steward, Stewardess, Hostess, Bartender, and Waiter positions on Italian flag Ro Ro Pax and Ro Ro Cargo vessels. Experience is advantageous but not required. The contract duration is approximately 2 months, with potential for extension. Knowledge of the Italian language is considered a plus. All standard Italian flag benefits are provided.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Catering Staff Vacancy on Ro Ro Pax/Cargo Vessels at Tinecomar Crewing Agency

item.description:
Location: Italian flag
Description:

Catering staff are sought for Ro Ro Pax and Ro Ro Cargo vessels under the Italian flag. The contract duration is approximately 2 months, with flexibility of +/-1 month. Knowledge of the Italian language and prior experience are considered advantageous. All benefits applicable to Italian flag vessels are included. Interested candidates should submit their applications.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Cook Vacancy on Ro Ro Pax and Ro Ro Cargo vessels at Tinecomar Crewing Agency

item.description:
Location: Italian flag vessels
Description:

Hiring is open for Steward & Stewardess, Hostess, Bartender & Waiter positions on Ro Ro Pax and Ro Ro Cargo vessels flying the Italian flag. Both experienced and inexperienced candidates are welcome to apply. Further details regarding contract duration and joining dates will be provided upon inquiry.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Catering Staff for Ro Ro Vessels at Tinecomar Crewing Agency

item.description:
Location: Global
Description:

A 2nd Cook position is available on a Fish vessel, operating globally. The role involves preparing daily menu items according to recipes and guidelines, maintaining high standards of food safety and quality, and ensuring galley readiness for inspections. A minimum of 3 years of kitchen operations experience, a Culinary School degree, and fluency in English are required. Food Safety/HACCP certification is also necessary.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 2nd Cook Job on Fish Vessel at TSTS Group

item.description:
Location: Global
Description:

A 2nd Cook position is available on a cruise ship operating globally. The role involves preparing and presenting high-quality dishes, supervising junior staff, and maintaining kitchen hygiene. Candidates should have proven experience as a Chef de Partie or similar, preferably on cruise ships, with strong international cuisine knowledge and adherence to food safety standards. Fluent English is required.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 2nd Cook Job on MSC Cruises Ship at TSTS Group

item.description:
Location: USA
Description:

Multiple positions are available on the MSC Seaside cruise ship, including Waiter, Water Park Cruise Staff, Junior Bar Waiter/ssCruise Ambassador, Mess Attendant, Ordinary Seaman, Specialty Asst. Waiter, and Commis II. Opportunities are open to both freshers and experienced candidates. The role is based in the USA.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Various Positions on Cruise Ship - MSC Seaside at Cruise Ship Careers

item.description:
Location: Mediterranean
Description:

Experienced Sole Stewardess is sought for a 30m private sailing yacht operating in the Mediterranean. This seasonal position requires immediate availability, with the candidate expected to join this week. The role involves independent management of the interior and high-standard service for up to 10 guests. Previous yachting experience, particularly as a Sole or Chief Stewardess, is preferred. Key responsibilities include service, housekeeping, laundry, and overall interior organisation.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Sole Stewardess Job on 30m Sailing Yacht at Crew & Concierge Ltd.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Messman is sought for a Ro Pax vessel, offering a 2 weeks on/off rotation. Candidates require conversational English and previous experience is advantageous. Joining details will be confirmed shortly.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Messman Job on Ro Pax Vessel at Clyde Marine Recruitment

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced Plumbers are sought for the Engine Department aboard MSC Cruises passenger vessels. Candidates should have prior experience in ship or hotel environments, good English, and knowledge of sanitary systems maintenance and repair. STCW certificates are preferred. This role requires the ability to work effectively in an international team and adapt to maritime life.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Plumber Job on MSC Cruises Ship at World of Seamen Group

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced Plumbers are sought to join the Engine Department aboard modern cruise ships. Candidates should possess prior experience in plumbing systems, good English communication skills, and the ability to work in an international team. STCW certificates are advantageous. This role offers the chance to gain international experience and build a career at sea.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Plumber Job on Cruise Ship at World of Seamen Group
